task_completion.description: Verify that the custom attributes 'Market_Segment' and 'Recruitment_Source' were created in the Central Participant Database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a LimeSurvey 'Manage attributes' or 'Attribute management' screen showing 'Market_Segment' and 'Recruitment_Source' added as text box attributes.

task_completion.description: Verify that all five specified participants were added to the Central Participant Database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the CPDB participant list showing the names and emails of Rachel Whitmore, James Nakamura, Amira Boualem, Carlos Medina, and Priya Subramanian.

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom attributes for the participants were correctly populated with their respective segments and sources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the CPDB participant table or individual participant edit screens showing the correct 'Market_Segment' (e.g., Millennials 25-34) and 'Recruitment_Source' (e.g., Social Media Ad) for the corresponding participants.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiated the process of assigning the participants to a survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dialog box, dropdown, or screen in LimeSurvey where the agent selects the participants and chooses the option to 'Share' or 'Add participants to survey'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the participants were successfully assigned to the 'Q1 2024 Brand Perception Tracker' survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey's specific participant table showing the 5 added participants, or a confirmation screen/CPDB view indicating they are now linked to the 'Q1 2024 Brand Perception Tracker' survey.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a web browser to interact with the LimeSurvey GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser interface navigating the LimeSurvey admin panel, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually entered the data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or pasting the participant details into the LimeSurvey input fields, rather than just displaying the final text in a notepad or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify that the results are genuinely rendered by the application and not faked via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI styling, fonts, and layout should be consistent with LimeSurvey. There should be no visible browser developer tools open modifying the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Survey: 'Q1 2024 Brand Perception Tracker'. Custom Attributes: 'Market_Segment', 'Recruitment_Source'. Expected Participants: 1. Rachel Whitmore (r.whitmore@consumerpanel.net) | Millennials 25-34 | Social Media Ad; 2. James Nakamura (j.nakamura@consumerpanel.net) | Gen X 45-54 | Email Campaign; 3. Amira Boualem (a.boualem@consumerpanel.net) | Gen Z 18-24 | University Partnership; 4. Carlos Medina (c.medina@consumerpanel.net) | Boomers 55-64 | Print Advertisement; 5. Priya Subramanian (p.subramanian@consumerpanel.net) | Millennials 25-34 | Referral Program.
